title: Expressing Opinions
learningGoal: The learner will synthesize the dictionary form, nai-form, and abstract nouns with the quotation particle to construct opinionated sentences.
instructions: Write four Japanese sentences expressing what you think. Use the exact grammar structure '~to omoimasu'. Be extremely careful with the second sentence—'truth' is a noun, so it requires a special plain-form copula ('da') before 'to'.

contentItems.text: For sentence 4, use the irregular negative verb 'Konai' (will not come).

writingPrompt: Translate: 1) I think it is expensive. 2) I think it is the truth. 3) I think it will rain tomorrow. 4) I think Tanaka will not come.
promptGoal: To construct grammatically accurate opinion sentences differentiating between i-adjective, noun, dictionary verb, and nai-verb attachment to 'to omoimasu'.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: たかいと おもいます。ほんとうだと おもいます。あした、あめが ふると おもいます。たなかさんは こないと おもいます。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Takai to omoimasu. Hontou da to omoimasu. Ashita, ame ga furu to omoimasu. Tanaka-san wa konai to omoimasu.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: I think it is expensive. I think it is the truth. Tomorrow, I think it will rain. I think Tanaka will not come.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect conjugation across four different word types: i-adj (takai), noun (hontou + da), dictionary verb (furu), and nai-form verb (konai).

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the learner write 'takai to omoimasu' without adding 'da'?
Did the learner write 'hontou DA to omoimasu'?
Did the learner write 'furu to omoimasu'?
Did the learner write 'konai to omoimasu'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: たかいと おもいます。ほんとうだと おもいます。あした、あめが ふると おもいます。たなかさんは こないと おもいます。
acceptableAlternates: たかいと おもいます。ほんとうだと おもいます。あした あめが ふると おもいます。たなかさんは こないと おもいます。
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Mastery of plain form variations attaching to '~to omoimasu'.

feedbackRules.onPass: Brilliant writing! You correctly applied the complex plain form rules.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the rules for nouns. Nouns and na-adjectives MUST have 'da' before 'to omoimasu'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't write 'Kimasen to omoimasu'. It must be the plain form 'Konai'.

hintText: To say 'I think it is the truth', use 'Hontou DA to omoimasu'.
commonMistakes: Writing 'Kimanai to omoimasu' (the negative of Kimasu is Konai).
